heading: Master’s control over operations
label: 358 Master’s control over operations
text: The radio installation, the operators, the regulation of their watches, the transmission and receipt of messages, and the radio service of the ship except as they may be regulated by law or international agreement, or by rules and regulations made in pursuance thereof, shall in the case of a ship of the United States be under the supreme control of the master.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see section 16 of act , set out as a note under .May 20, 1937May 20, 1937section 351 of this title
